baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: I need Clerk org billing with webhooks and a custom sign-in page. Which skills should be used?
evals.expected_output: Routes the user to the specific Clerk skills for organizations, billing, webhooks, and custom UI while preserving version detection and safety checks.
assertions: Starts with Clerk SDK version detection when implementation details matter.
Chooses task-specific Clerk skills instead of duplicating their full guidance.
Requires target app/instance confirmation before deploy, secret rotation, deletion, or production config changes.
Mentions current SDK as the default when the version is unclear.
